Character.java

00027 permission to link this library with independent modules to produce an
00028 executable, regardless of the license terms of these independent
00029 modules, and to copy and distribute the resulting executable under
00030 terms of your choice, provided that you also meet, for each linked
00031 independent module, the terms and conditions of the license of that
00032 module.  An independent module is a module which is not derived from
00033 or based on this library.  If you modify this library, you may extend
00034 this exception to your version of the library, but you are not
00035 obligated to do so.  If you do not wish to do so, delete this
00036 exception statement from your version. */
00037 
00038 package java.lang;
00039 
00062 public final class Character
00063 {
00067     public static final int MIN_RADIX = 2;
00068 
00072     public static final int MAX_RADIX = 36;
00073 
00078     public static final char MIN_VALUE = '\u0000';
00079 
00084     public static final char MAX_VALUE = '\uFFFF';
00085 
00089     private final char value;
00090 
00096     public Character(char value)
00097     {
00098         this.value = value;
00099     }
00100 
00106     public char charValue()
00107     {
00108         return value;
00109     }
00110 
00117     public int hashCode()
00118     {
00119         return value;
00120     }
00121 
00129     public boolean equals(Object o)
00130     {
00131         return o instanceof Character && value == ((Character) o).value;
00132     }
00133 
00140     public String toString()
00141     {
00142         // Package constructor avoids an array copy.
00143         return new String(new char[] { value }, 0, 1, true);
00144     }
00145 
00155     public static boolean isLowerCase(char ch)
00156     {
00157         if ((ch >= 'a') && (ch <= 'z'))
00158             return true;
00159         else if ((ch >= 0x00DF) && (ch <= 0x00FF) && (ch != 0x00F7))
00160             return true;
00161         else
00162             return false;
00163     }
00164 
00174     public static boolean isUpperCase(char ch)
00175     {
00176         if ((ch >= 'A') && (ch <= 'Z'))
00177             return true;
00178         else if ((ch >= 0x00C0) && (ch <= 0x00DE) && (ch != 0x00D7))
00179             return true;
00180         else
00181             return false;
00182     }
00183 
00193     public static boolean isDigit(char ch)
00194     {
00195         if ((ch >= '0') && (ch <= '9'))
00196             return true;
00197         else
00198             return false;
00199     }
00200 
00210     public static char toLowerCase(char ch)
00211     {
00212         if ((ch >= 'A') && (ch <= 'Z'))
00213             return (char) ((ch - 'A') + 'a');
00214         else if ((ch >= 0x00C0) && (ch <= 0x00DE) && (ch != 0x00D7))
00215             return (char) ((ch - 0x00C0) + 0x00DF);
00216         else
00217             return ch;
00218     }
00219 
00229     public static char toUpperCase(char ch)
00230     {
00231         if ((ch >= 'a') && (ch <= 'z'))
00232             return (char) ((ch - 'a') + 'A');
00233         else if ((ch >= 0x00DF) && (ch <= 0x00FF) && (ch != 0x00F7))
00234             return (char) ((ch - 0x00DF) + 0x00C0);
00235         else
00236             return ch;
00237     }
00238 
00252     public static int digit(char ch, int radix)
00253     {
00254         int value = 0;
00255 
00256         if (radix >= Character.MIN_RADIX && radix <= Character.MAX_RADIX)
00257         {
00258             if ((ch >= '0') && (ch <= '9'))
00259                 value = ch - '0';
00260             else if (isUpperCase(ch) || isLowerCase(ch))
00261                 value = (ch & 0x1F) + 9;
00262             else
00263                 return -1;
00264         }
00265         else
00266             return -1;
00267 
00268         if (value < radix)
00269             return value;
00270         else
00271             return -1;
00272     }
00273 } // class Character
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:24 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
